sect1.title: ISOWeekNumWeekDayAndYearFromDate

row.entry: A date value in the Date_t format.
ISOWeekNumWeekDayAndYearFromDate returns a module with weekNumber (1–53), year (the ISO week-numbering year), and weekDay (1–7, where 1 = Monday).

sect1.para: The ISOWeekNumWeekDayAndYearFromDate function returns a module containing the ISO week number, the ISO week-numbering year, and the ISO day of week for the given date. This is an ISO-8601 implementation of computing week numbers ("week dates").
